clientLogos.title: 信赖我们的众多领先企业

about.title: 关于 Valcot

story.title: 品牌故事
story.description: Valcot Partners 坚信不论何种规模的企业，都应享有专业级的人事运营服务。从最初为中小微企业提供薪资结算起步，我们一路成长为泰国最受信任的人事运营综合服务伙伴之一。

mission.title: 企业使命
mission.description: 全面接管客户在人事及合规领域的后台运营压力，助力企业的可持续成长，从而让客户将精力全身心地投入到团队管理和业务扩张上。

items.title: 诚信透明 (Integrity)
items.description: 以高度透明与诚实的态度开展业务，严格遵守客户保密协定。

items.title: 追求卓越 (Excellence)
items.description: 致力于通过体系化的操作流程，交付最优质的服务和结果。

items.title: 客户至上 (Client-Centric)
items.description: 充分洞察客户特性，量身定制专属服务。

items.title: 合规底线 (Compliance)
items.description: 严守一切相关规章法律，恪守合规底线。

about.description: Valcot 是一家专注企业人事支持与后台运营的服务商。我们的核心业务涵盖人事行政、薪酬福利支持、招聘执行以及合规文档整理。我们通过清晰的权责划分和一致性交付流程，为客户削减运营摩擦，提升业务精度。
about.painpoints: 我们日常解决的众多企业痛点包括：零散的人事文档档案、耗费人力的考勤与加班核算、不规范的数据提交流程，以及往往因资料短缺导致的薪资反复核定。
about.suitable: 最适配于工厂、中小企业和同时管理多个办公地点的企业——在不突然扩张内部员工数量的前提下，提供高度可靠的支持后盾。

items.question: Valcot 的具体业务范围是什么？什么是超出职责范围的？
items.answer: 我们专注在根据协议范围内提供基于人力资源的行政职能、人事支持、招聘和合规文件代办理。我们向来不做未经细致评估和划定界限下“包揽一切”的含糊承诺。

items.question: 服务价格如何制定？
items.answer: 定价取决于企业规模（人数）、多地运营的复杂程度、考勤体系设计和服务需求广度。在提供报价之前，我们将对您的现状进行全面的需求评估。

items.question: 客户需要向你们提供哪些信息？
items.answer: 主要包括员工基础数据、职场与薪资结算周期框架、常规工作时长与加班条例，以及为了完成履约必须向我们移交的相关人事审批材料。这些将极大提升作业准确性并避免返工。

items.question: 财税支持等同于全盘财务代理吗？
items.answer: 我们的财税相关范畴基于合约而定，其重点多是在单据、发票跟催记录，或者财务行政对接层面。部分特殊项目会与特许执牌会计师或合作团队进行联合作业。

items.question: 如果客户的单据或数据收集不完整会怎样？
items.answer: 我们将严格依时间节点和核对清单推进工作。如有资料遗失，我们将清晰提醒缺失项及由此导致的潜在周期延误，好让企业管理者做好准备或敦促补齐。

items.question: Valcot 如何保障员工资料与企业机密不被泄露？
items.answer: 我们信守严格保密的职业准则，引入成熟可靠的资料归档技术，并且针对访问权限建立内部权责审批隔离制度，以多维度保护敏感信息。

contact.title: Sustainable business growth starts with effective systems
contact.subtitle: At Valcot Partners, we believe stable growth needs strong support systems across people, payroll, legal, accounting, technology, and back-office operations. We help reduce workload, improve accuracy, and move your business forward with confidence. Start with a free 30-minute consultation and we will help identify which services fit your situation at no cost.

aboutPage.heroSubtitle: A Business Support Solutions partner connecting people, legal, finance, technology, and operations into one reliable support system.
aboutPage.storyTitle: A partner that understands your business
aboutPage.storyP1: Valcot Partners is more than a back-office provider. We act as a strategic partner helping organizations build reliable business support systems from the ground up. We understand that growth depends on how people, legal, accounting, tax, technology, and operations work together.
aboutPage.storyP2: Our team supports HR, payroll, recruitment, legal and compliance, accounting and tax, event operations, and travel coordination, giving your organization one clear point of coordination while reducing manual work and improving audit readiness.
aboutPage.missionText: To reduce back-office complexity, improve management efficiency, raise operating standards, and deliver legally compliant, transparent, and auditable services through experts who understand each client’s context and design solutions around real needs.

values.title: 诚信与正直
values.desc: 我们以绝对的透明和真诚开展合作，客户的信任是我们最珍视的资产。

values.title: 以客户为中心
values.desc: 客户的成功就是我们的成功。每一项服务都是为您的业务量身打造。

values.title: 法律合规
values.desc: 我们为您代理的一切操作不仅遵循泰国法律，更符合国际标准。

aboutPage.ctaTitle: 准备好让我们成为您的HR合作伙伴了吗？
aboutPage.ctaSubtitle: 免费咨询，无任何附加条件或隐形成本。
storyParagraphs: Valcot Partners is more than a back-office provider. We act as a strategic partner helping organizations build reliable business support systems from the ground up. We understand that growth depends on how people, legal, accounting, tax, technology, and operations work together.

Our team supports HR, payroll, recruitment, legal and compliance, accounting and tax, event operations, and travel coordination, giving your organization one clear point of coordination while reducing manual work and improving audit readiness.
Every service is shaped around the client’s actual context, including company size, team structure, industry, site complexity, and growth goals.
aboutPage.visionText: To be a trusted Business Support Solutions partner that connects expertise in people, legal, finance, technology, and operations so businesses can operate with stability, agility, and long-term readiness for growth.

sme.title: 中小型企业与初创公司
sme.subtitle: 专为成长中企业打造的HR解决方案——让您专注核心业务，无忧人事运营。
painPoints: 没有专职HR团队，但员工数逐日增加
人工处理薪资，面临漏缴税或社保的风险
不确定雇佣合同及规章制度是否完全符合当地法律
急需招聘但没有时间层层筛选候选人
solutions: 基础HR运营 —— 建立结构化且系统化的人事管理体系
薪酬管理 —— 精准计算薪资、按时报税及缴纳社保
法律合规 —— 起草合规的劳务合同与合法的公司规章
人才招聘 —— 我们负责筛选，直接向您发送合格的候选人名单

representative.title: 外国驻泰代表处
representative.subtitle: 为想在泰国招募员工的外国代表处提供的全方位名义雇主(EOR)与HR解决方案。
painPoints: 想在泰国招聘团队，但尚未注册本地公司
对泰国复杂的劳动法及不断更新的法规不熟悉
急需一个值得信赖的 Employer of Record (EOR) 合作伙伴
不知如何办理外籍员工的工作许可(Work Permit)和签证
solutions: EOR名义雇主 —— Valcot作为合法雇主代为雇佣，您无需注册泰国实体
薪资与税务 —— 按时发放工资清单、精准依法申报个人所得税
工作许可与签证 —— 一站式的外籍员工工作签办理和续签服务
合规保障 —— 充分保障所有操作符合泰国最新劳动法规定

multinational.title: 跨国企业集团
multinational.subtitle: 为在泰国运营的跨国企业提供可无缝扩展的HR解决方案。
painPoints: 跨地区、多站点及多轮班制的员工统筹管理难题
由于组织复杂，需要高度定制化的分站点薪资报告
亟需一个能伴随业务高速扩张而同步扩展的HR外包伙伴
不仅要遵守泰国本地法律，还必须符合集团全球合法的统一标准
solutions: 多站点HR运营 —— 跨区域、基于门店/部门的考勤与数据管理结构
企业级薪酬体系 —— 站点级别的网状薪资汇总 + 特殊工时/奖金独立处理
专属项目经理 —— 为您的集团配备一位对接一切事务的高阶账户经理
大批量招聘服务 —— 能够在有限的时间内达成高规模用人指标

accounting.heroSubtitle: 账目清晰与报税准点，一家卓越企业生存的命脉基石。通过我们执业级专业财会团队之手，将一团乱麻的数据报表完美梳理为您扩张的隐形助力。

highlights.label: 按时报税结案：拒绝一切滞纳罚金
具备泰国执业资格：所有最终报告质量权威保证
经营战情室：动态更新管理层最痛点的资金脉络图

accounting.coverageTitle: 不留一处财务死角的审计管家
accounting.coverageSubtitle: 财务架构与高危税务稽查点的排雷工作，从此刻起交给专业会计师。
coverageItems: 严格遵照最新IFRS及TAS准则开展月度账目录入核对
增值税(VAT)进销抵扣与一切预扣税(Withholding Tax)明细上报
年度企业所得基本税额精密规划并履行强制缴纳
政府社保专户动态结余强制通告报备
年度结账损益报表(FS)与资产负债精算
直面泰国税务局严厉突击的强效陪同抗辩和释疑
accounting.coverageDesc: 迅如闪电的作业，恪尽职守遵循泰国严苛审计规则——我们的存在，皆为化解贵公司财产侵蚀之忧。
accounting.ctaTitle: 打算让粗糙的账目重见天日并获得真正的健康了吗？
accounting.ctaSubtitle: 从此告别那些让大脑短路的凭证复印件海。选择信任且硬核的伙伴介入，首次面谈全部减免收费，服务项全透明不坐地起价。

aboutPreview.heading: A partner that understands your business
body: Valcot Partners is more than a back-office provider. We act as a strategic partner helping organizations build reliable business support systems from the ground up. We understand that growth depends on how people, legal, accounting, tax, technology, and operations work together.

Our team supports HR, payroll, recruitment, legal and compliance, accounting and tax, event operations, and travel coordination, giving your organization one clear point of coordination while reducing manual work and improving audit readiness.
Every service is shaped around the client’s actual context, including company size, team structure, industry, site complexity, and growth goals.
aboutPreview.visionText: To be a trusted Business Support Solutions partner that connects expertise in people, legal, finance, technology, and operations so businesses can operate with stability, agility, and long-term readiness for growth.
aboutPreview.missionText: To reduce back-office complexity, improve management efficiency, raise operating standards, and deliver legally compliant, transparent, and auditable services through experts who understand each client’s context and design solutions around real needs.
